example: We need to negotiate a better price with the supplier.
example_zh: 我們需要和供應商協商更好的價格。

example: The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the market.
example_zh: 這份報告提供了全面的市場分析。

example: The company will implement the new policy next month.
example_zh: 公司下個月將實施新政策。

example: The deadline for the project is this Friday.
example_zh: 這個專案的截止日期是本週五。

example: The firm made a substantial profit last quarter.
example_zh: 這家公司上一季獲得了可觀的利潤。

example: The new software will facilitate communication between departments.
example_zh: 新軟體將促進部門之間的溝通。

example: We conduct an inventory check at the end of each month.
example_zh: 我們每個月底進行庫存盤點。

example: The airline will compensate passengers for the delay.
example_zh: 航空公司將補償乘客延誤的損失。

example: The preliminary results look promising.
example_zh: 初步結果看起來很有希望。

example: The two companies plan to merge next year.
example_zh: 這兩家公司計劃明年合併。

example: Please review the itinerary before the business trip.
example_zh: 出差前請先確認行程表。

example: The company will reimburse your travel expenses.
example_zh: 公司會報銷你的差旅費用。

example: These boots are durable and waterproof.
example_zh: 這雙靴子耐用又防水。

example: Her expertise in finance made her the ideal candidate.
example_zh: 她的財務專業使她成為理想人選。

example: All employees must comply with the safety regulations.
example_zh: 所有員工都必須遵守安全規定。

example: We set a tentative date for the meeting.
example_zh: 我們為會議訂了一個暫定日期。

example: The warehouse has a surplus of last season's products.
example_zh: 倉庫裡有上一季產品的剩餘庫存。

example: A good manager knows how to delegate tasks.
example_zh: 好的主管懂得如何分派工作。

example: The plan sounds feasible within our budget.
example_zh: 這個計畫在我們的預算內聽起來可行。

example: The documents will arrive by courier tomorrow morning.
example_zh: 文件明天早上會由快遞送達。
